case_title: JIAJING WU VS. DAVID CONG MA JR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,700.00 FILED BY WU, JIAJING AS TO DEFENDANT MA JR, DAVID CONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JIAJING WU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID CONG MA JR. IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, JIAJING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MA JR, DAVID CONG DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: PER THE DEFENDANTS FATHER, THE DEFENDANT IS CURRENTLY OUT OF THE COUNTRY AND WILL NOT RETURN FOR A "COUPLE OF MONTHS." THE DEFENDANTS FATHER REFUSED TO ACCEPT SERVICE OF THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER. (HEARING DATE - 05/13/2022 AT 8:30AM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, JIAJING AS TO DEFENDANT MA JR, DAVID CONG
